---
title: "master_thesis_site_deepdive"
author: "Savannah K. Miller"
date: "2026-06-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r, working directory and packages}



# data import and database management 
# reading files, reshaping data, and efficient data handling 

#######################################################

library(readxl) # import excel spreadsheets
library(data.table) #quick manipulation of large datasets
library(stringr) # text and string processing 
library(lubridate) # data and time handling 
library(writexl) # exports editted databases into excel files

#######################################################

# General data science workflow 
# Collection of packages for data manipulation and plotting

#######################################################

library(tidyverse)

#######################################################

#Statistical analyses and mixed models 
# Hypothesis testing, summaries, and model fitting 

#######################################################

library(gt) # displaying formatted tables for statistics 
library(rstatix) # statistical tests and assumption checking
library(lmerTest) # p-values and tests for lme4 models 
library(lme4) # linear and generalized mixed-effects models
library(ggeffects) # predicted values and marginal effects 

#######################################################

# Data visualization 
# Plot creation, figure assembly, and publication formatting 

#######################################################

library(patchwork) #combine ggplots into multi-panel figures
library(cowplot) # figure arrangement and plot annotations
library(rcartocolor) # color palettes
library(ggh4x) # advanced ggplot extensions
library(scales) # axis labels, formatting, and scaling 
library(ggridges)

#######################################################
# Spatial data and mapping 
# GIS data handling and map visualization
#######################################################

library(sf) #spatial vector data
library(ggmap) #basemaps and geographic visualization
library(ggspatial) #spatial annotations and map elements
library(leaflet) #interactive web maps

#######################################################

#Tables and report outputs 
# Interactive tables and report presentation 

#######################################################

library(reactable) #interactive tables for reports

#######################################################
# R markdown and document rendering 
# PDF generation and LaTeX support 
#######################################################

library(tinytex) #LaTeX engine for PDF knitting
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r, load the datasheet}

master_thesis <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\master_thesis.csv")


# Reassign factors to appropriate variables 

master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field = as.Date(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field, 
                                             format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
)
master_thesis$Date.removed.from.field = as.Date(master_thesis$Date.removed.from.field,            
                                                format = "%m/%d/%Y"   # need this so R doesn't automatically assume format
)
master_thesis$Study.Phase <- factor(master_thesis$Study.Phase, levels = c("M1", "M2", "M3", "M4", "M5", "M6","M7", "M8", "M9", "M10", "M11", "M12"))
master_thesis$Site <- as.factor(master_thesis$Site)
master_thesis$Tran <- as.factor(master_thesis$Tran)
master_thesis$Dist <- as.factor(master_thesis$Dist)
master_thesis$Replicate<- as.factor(master_thesis$Replicate)
master_thesis$Year<- as.factor(master_thesis$Year)
master_thesis$Flux <- as.numeric(master_thesis$Flux)
master_thesis$Hydro_Period <- factor(master_thesis$Hydro_Period, levels = c("Late_Dry\n(Months 1-3)", "Tran\n(Months 4-6)", "Wet\n(Months 7-9)", "Growth\n(Months 10-12)"))
master_thesis$marsh_edge_type <- as.factor(master_thesis$marsh_edge_type)
master_thesis$marsh_orientation <- as.factor(master_thesis$marsh_orientation)
master_thesis$Marsh_Area <- as.factor(master_thesis$Marsh_Area)


```


```{r, site C}


# Filter to just Corte Madera first
cm_data <- master_thesis %>%
  filter(Site == "Corte Madera")

# Summarize by Transect and Study.Phase instead of by Site
cm_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(
    Tran,
    Study.Phase
  ) %>%
summarise(
  mean_flux = mean(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE),
  se_flux = sd(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(Flux >= 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
  .groups = "drop"
)

ggplot(
  cm_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)) 
  )

```


```{r}


cm_raincloud = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Study.Phase,
    fill = Study.Phase
  )
) +  
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA))
cm_raincloud

cmraincloud_tran = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Study.Phase,
    fill = Study.Phase
  )
) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 125))
cmraincloud_tran
```

```{r}
# basic

basic_fluxcm = ggplot(cm_data, aes(x = Flux)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Distribution at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = "Count"
  )
basic_fluxcm

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\basic_fluxcm_c.png"),
  plot = basic_fluxcm,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux through time 

phase_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_time_c = ggplot(
  phase_summary,
  aes(x = Study.Phase, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,30)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux Through Time at", "Corte Madera"),
    subtitle = "Negative flux values set to zero",
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))
  )

meanflux_time_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_time_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_time_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux by hydro_period 

hydro_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Hydro_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_hydro_c = ggplot(
  hydro_summary,
  aes(x = Hydro_Period, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Hydrologic Period at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Hydrologic Period",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))
  )

meanflux_hydro_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_hydro_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_hydro_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux by distance 

dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Dist) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_dist_c = ggplot(
  dist_summary,
  aes(x = Dist, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,9.5)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Distance from Marsh Edge at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))
  )

meanflux_dist_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_dist_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux by distance and hydro

dist_hydro_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Dist, Hydro_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

flux_dist_hydro_c = ggplot(
  dist_hydro_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Hydro_Period,
    group = Hydro_Period
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Distance x Hydrologic Period at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Hydrologic Period"
  )

flux_dist_hydro_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_dist_hydro_c.png"),
  plot = flux_dist_hydro_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux through time by distance 

time_dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Dist, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

time_dist_summary <- time_dist_summary %>%
  mutate(Dist_numeric = as.numeric(as.character(Dist)))

flux_dist_gradient_c = ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist_numeric,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Study.Phase
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 1.2,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    position = position_dodge(width = 2)
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = Study.Phase),
    size = 4,
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.4,
    position = position_dodge(width = 2)
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.85) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.85) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = unique(time_dist_summary$Dist_numeric),
    limits = c(-2, 52)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux at Discrete Marsh-Edge Sampling Points at", "Corte Madera"),
    subtitle = "7 sampling areas across 50 m; error bars = ±1 SE",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Study Phase",
    fill = "Study Phase"
  )
flux_dist_gradient_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_dist_gradient_c.png"),
  plot = flux_dist_gradient_c,
  width = 14,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# heat map and distance
flux_heatmap_c = ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = Dist,
    fill = mean_flux
  )
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(mean_flux, 1)),
    color = "white",
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Heatmap: Study Phase x Distance at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = "Distance from Marsh Edge"
  )
flux_heatmap_c

ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_heatmap_c.png"),
  plot = flux_heatmap_c,
  width = 12,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux through time by transect 

tran_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Study.Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

flux_tran_time_c = ggplot(
  tran_summary,
  aes(
    x = Study.Phase,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,30)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Through Time by Transect at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Study Phase",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect"
  )
flux_tran_time_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_tran_time_c.png"),
  plot = flux_tran_time_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)


# raw flux and distance 

rawflux_dist_c = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = as.numeric(as.character(Dist)),
    y = Flux
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,120)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Raw Flux vs Distance at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
  )
rawflux_dist_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\rawflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = rawflux_dist_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# elev and flux

flux_elev_c = ggplot(cm_elev,
   aes(
     x = Elevation_m,
     y = Flux
   )
 ) +
   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
   labs(
     title = paste("Flux vs Elevation at", "Corte Madera"),
     x = "Elevation_m",
     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
   )

flux_elev_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_elev_c.png"),
  plot = flux_elev_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# z star and flux

flux_z_c = ggplot(
  cm_elev,
   aes(
     x = z_star,
     y = Flux
   )
 ) +
   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
   labs(
     title = paste("Flux vs Elevation at", "Corte Madera"),
     x = "z_star",
     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
   )

flux_z_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_z_c.png"),
  plot = flux_z_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# once veg is cleaned and entered 

# one_site <- one_site %>%
#   mutate(
#     Veg_Structure = Percent_Cover * Avg_Height
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Percent_Cover,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Percent Cover at", "Corte Madera"),
#     x = "Percent Vegetation Cover",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Veg_Structure,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Vegetation Structure at", "Corte Madera"),
#     x = "Vegetation Structure Index (Cover x Height)",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
#   )
```


```{r, corte madera profile}
# Step 1: Create numeric distance, then average elevation across the 3 replicates within each Transect x Distance
elevation_profile <- cm_elev %>%
  mutate(Dist_numeric = as.numeric(as.character(Dist))) %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_elevation = mean(Elevation_m, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_elevation = sd(Elevation_m, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Step 2: Plot
elevation_profile_c = ggplot(
  elevation_profile,
  aes(
    x = Dist_numeric,
    y = mean_elevation,
    color = Tran,
    fill = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5, shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_elevation - se_elevation,
      ymax = mean_elevation + se_elevation
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(elevation_profile$Dist_numeric))) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Marsh Surface Elevation Profile at", "Corte Madera"),
    subtitle = "Mean elevation \u00b1 SE across 3 replicates per sampling area",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = "Elevation (m)",
    color = "Transect",
    fill = "Transect"
  )
elevation_profile_c

ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\elevation_profile_c.png"),
  plot = elevation_profile_c,
  width = 14,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)




# for z star accounting 

zstar_profile <- cm_elev %>%
  mutate(Dist_numeric = as.numeric(as.character(Dist))) %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_zstar = mean(z_star, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_zstar = sd(z_star, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

zstar_profile_c = ggplot(
  zstar_profile,
  aes(
    x = Dist_numeric,
    y = mean_zstar,
    color = Tran,
    fill = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5, shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_zstar - se_zstar,
      ymax = mean_zstar + se_zstar
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(zstar_profile$Dist_numeric))) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Relative Tidal Elevation (Z*) Profile at", "Corte Madera"),
    subtitle = "Mean Z* \u00b1 SE across 3 replicates per sampling area",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = "Z* (Relative Tidal Elevation)",
    color = "Transect",
    fill = "Transect"
  )
zstar_profile_c

ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\zstar_profile_c.png"),
  plot = zstar_profile_c,
  width = 14,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```


```{r, more detailed plots for time and space}
# mean flux per distance (study phase-time)

meanflux_dist_sp_c = ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(x = Dist, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Study.Phase) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,9.5)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Distance from Marsh Edge at", "Corte Madera Per Study Phase"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))
  )

meanflux_dist_sp_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_sp_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_dist_sp_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

#mean flux per study phase (distance)

meanflux_sp_dist_c = ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(x = Study.Phase, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
   facet_wrap(~Dist) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,9.5)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Distance from Marsh Edge at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))
  )

meanflux_sp_dist_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_sp_dist_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_dist_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```


```{r, 
```
